title: micranthemum reflexum
intro: Micranthemum reflexum, also known as the "Dwarf Lindernia" or "Money Plant", is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Linderniaceae family. Traditionally, Micranthemum reflexum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antibacterial agent, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Micranthemum reflexum can be found in the form of infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
